title: CavsCobbleMons
description: An addon that adds more high-quality, textured, and animated models to Cobblemon.
body:
CavsCobbleMons is an addon to implement more Cobblemon into the game. My team and I are working on making sure this addon adds more high-quality, textured, and animated models to Cobblemon to enrich your experience with unimplemented mons. Including but not limited to:
- Hatenna
- Hattrem
- Hatterene
- Spidops
- Tarountula
- Kubfu
- Virizion
- Smeargle
- Cresellia
- Chi-Yu
- Wo-Chien
- Ting-Lu
- Dondozo
- Escavalier
- Shadow-Lugia
- Sneasler
- Chewtle
- Drednaw
- Stakataka

For more information click here: [CavsCobbleMons Roadmap](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1wX7C7yR1veTndSJjpURQvxPYsnEIn1YI_HHSgrjR42w/edit?usp=sharing)

Join the Discord for Support: [Discord](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1wX7C7yR1veTndSJjpURQvxPYsnEIn1YI_HHSgrjR42w/edit?usp=sharing)
